---
title: "Medusa Target Validation Report"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
params:
  studySpec: !r NULL
  cisMrResults: !r NULL
  colocResults: !r NULL
  diagnosticResults: !r NULL
  ancestryDiagnostics: !r NULL
  overlapDiagnostics: !r NULL
  trialContext: !r NULL
  decision: !r NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
study <- params$studySpec
decision <- params$decision
```

# Summary

**Study ID:** `r study$studyId`

**Target:** `r paste(study$targetGene, collapse = ", ")`

**Outcome:** `r if (!is.null(study$outcomeDefinition$label)) study$outcomeDefinition$label else study$outcomeDefinition$cancer`

**Recommendation:** `r toupper(decision$recommendation)`

## Decision Rationale

```{r}
knitr::kable(
  data.frame(reason = unlist(decision$reasons), stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  col.names = "Reason"
)
```

# Evidence Summary

## Cis-MR

```{r}
if (!is.null(params$cisMrResults) && !is.null(params$cisMrResults$summary)) {
  knitr::kable(params$cisMrResults$summary, digits = 3)
} else {
  cat("No cis-MR results provided.")
}
```

## Colocalization

```{r}
if (!is.null(params$colocResults)) {
  colocSummary <- data.frame(
    hypothesis = names(params$colocResults$posterior),
    posterior = unname(params$colocResults$posterior),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  knitr::kable(colocSummary, digits = 3)
} else {
  cat("No colocalization results provided.")
}
```

## Diagnostics

```{r}
diagRows <- list()
if (!is.null(params$diagnosticResults) && !is.null(params$diagnosticResults$diagnosticFlags)) {
  diagRows[["instrument"]] <- data.frame(
    check = names(params$diagnosticResults$diagnosticFlags),
    flag = unname(params$diagnosticResults$diagnosticFlags),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}
if (!is.null(params$ancestryDiagnostics)) {
  diagRows[["ancestry"]] <- data.frame(
    check = c("exposureOutcomeDistance", "outcomeLdDistance", "failClosed"),
    flag = c(
      params$ancestryDiagnostics$exposureOutcomeDistance,
      params$ancestryDiagnostics$outcomeLdDistance,
      params$ancestryDiagnostics$failClosed
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}
if (!is.null(params$overlapDiagnostics)) {
  diagRows[["overlap"]] <- data.frame(
    check = c("overlapProportion", "biasIndex", "riskLevel"),
    flag = c(
      params$overlapDiagnostics$overlapProportion,
      params$overlapDiagnostics$biasIndex,
      params$overlapDiagnostics$riskLevel
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

if (length(diagRows) > 0) {
  knitr::kable(do.call(rbind, diagRows))
} else {
  cat("No diagnostics provided.")
}
```

# STROBE-MR Appendix

```{r}
appendix <- data.frame(
  item = c(
    "Exposure source",
    "Instrument mode",
    "Primary population",
    "Negative controls",
    "Decision thresholds"
  ),
  value = c(
    study$exposureSource,
    study$instrumentMode,
    study$primaryPopulation,
    paste(study$negativeControls, collapse = ", "),
    paste(
      sprintf("%s=%s", names(study$decisionThresholds), unlist(study$decisionThresholds)),
      collapse = "; "
    )
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
knitr::kable(appendix)
```

# Trial Context

```{r}
if (!is.null(params$trialContext) && length(params$trialContext) > 0) {
  cat(paste0("- ", params$trialContext, collapse = "\n"))
} else {
  cat("No trial context provided.")
}
```
